shortDescription.en: Remote terminals in your browser. Connect machines, run shells from anywhere.
shortDescription.zh_CN: 浏览器远程终端。连接机器，随时随地执行 Shell。

fullDescription.en:
CORTERM connects your machines to a browser-based terminal. Run a lightweight Worker agent on any machine, access it through the Gateway from anywhere on any device.

Architecture: Browser → Gateway → Worker

KEY FEATURES:
• Browser-Native Terminal: Full xterm.js with WebGL rendering. Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
• Multiple Login Methods: SMS OTP verification, Apple, GitHub, Google OAuth, or guest access.
• Self-Hosted: Run your own Gateway and Workers. No cloud dependency. Your data stays yours.
• Session Persistence: Detach and reattach to sessions. Your shell keeps running even if you close the browser.
• SignalR Real-Time: Bidirectional streaming over WebSockets with MessagePack for minimal latency.
• Virtual Keyboard for Mobile: Floating arrow keys, Ctrl, Alt, Esc, and Tab buttons.
• Dark/Light Theme: Terminal-friendly dark mode and light mode.
• Bilingual UI: Full English and Chinese language support.
• Docker Ready: Gateway ships as a container image on GHCR. Deploy in seconds.
• Multi-Platform Workers: Supports Linux (amd64/arm64), macOS (Apple Silicon), Windows x64, and Docker.

HOW IT WORKS:
1. Install the Worker agent on the machine you want to access (one command: curl -fsSL https://gateway.ct.rwecho.top/install.sh | sh)
2. Deploy the Gateway server (docker run ghcr.io/monster-echo/cortexterminal-gateway:latest)
3. Open your browser, log in, and your terminal is ready.

The mobile app is a native companion for the self-hosted Gateway. It wraps the full web console with push notifications, native authentication, and device integration.

Open source. MIT licensed.
fullDescription.zh_CN:
云枞终端 (CORTERM) 将你的机器连接到浏览器终端。在任何机器上安装轻量级 Worker 代理，通过 Gateway 随时随地访问。

架构：Browser → Gateway → Worker

核心功能：
• 浏览器原生终端：基于 xterm.js + WebGL 的完整终端。支持桌面、平板和手机。
• 多种登录方式：短信验证码、Apple、GitHub、Google 登录，或访客模式。
• 自托管部署：运行你自己的 Gateway 和 Worker，无云依赖，数据完全由你掌控。
• 会话持久化：支持分离和重连会话，关闭浏览器后 Shell 仍然运行。
• SignalR 实时通信：基于 WebSocket 的双向流，使用 MessagePack 压缩实现极低延迟。
• 移动端虚拟键盘：浮动方向键、Ctrl、Alt、Esc、Tab 按钮。
• 深色/浅色主题：终端友好的深色模式和浅色模式。
• 中英双语界面：完整的中文和英文支持。
• Docker 就绪：Gateway 以容器镜像发布在 GHCR，几秒内部署。
• 多平台 Worker：支持 Linux (amd64/arm64)、macOS (Apple Silicon)、Windows x64、Docker。

使用步骤：
1. 在目标机器上安装 Worker（一行命令：curl -fsSL https://gateway.ct.rwecho.top/install.sh | sh）
2. 部署 Gateway 服务器（docker run ghcr.io/monster-echo/cortexterminal-gateway:latest）
3. 打开浏览器，登录后即可使用终端。

移动端应用是自托管 Gateway 的配套工具，将完整的 Web 控制台以原生移动体验呈现，支持推送通知、原生认证和设备集成。

开源项目，MIT 许可证。
